content: Jacket Demby’s is a master student in Computer Engineering at the University of Missouri-Columbia where he works with the Vision Guided and Intelligent Robotics Laboratory (ViGIR-Lab). His research interest are going towards machine learning, deep learning, robotics, computer vision and assistive technologies.
